span.p:
N-02 Parse flags
env, env-file,
backup-dir, data-dir,
skip-google-drive

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
N-03 Build subprocess env
copy os.environ and
set ENV_FILE if provided

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
N-04 Build backup command
python backup_stores.py
with backup options
